forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: Check your email for a password reset link. Click the link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.noSessionDescription: Please click the link in your email to reset your password.

activate.title: Activate your plan
activate.subtitleDefault: Complete setup to activate your subscription.
activate.missingInfo: Missing activation info. Please restart onboarding.
activate.paymentNotConfirmed: Payment not confirmed. Please ensure your payment was successful.
activate.accountCreatedBody: Check your email to set your password. Once you've set your password, you can sign in to access your account.

verifyEmail.requestNewEmail: Please request a new verification email.

toasts.resetLinkSent: Password reset link sent to your email
toasts.resetLinkFailed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
toasts.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.
toasts.passwordResetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
toasts.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email to set your password.
toasts.activationLoadFailed: Unable to load activation session. Please restart onboarding.
toasts.accountCreationSlow: Account creation is taking longer than expected. Please check your email or contact support.
